title: Hummus Energizer
description: A sweet and crispy hummus dish with a Spanish twist, perfect for an energizing snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: 2 cups cooked chickpeas
ingredients.notes: Use canned or cook from scratch.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup maple syrup or honey for sweetness
ingredients.notes: Sweetens the hummus to a natural sugar alternative.

instructions: Blend together chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, maple syrup/honey, and salt in a food processor until smooth.
Add the olive oil gradually while blending to achieve desired consistency. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Transfer hummus into serving bowls or dishes.
Serve with fresh-cut vegetables like bell peppers, cucumbers, carrots, etc., for added crunch and nutrients.
Optional: Garnish with a drizzle of extra olive oil and a sprinkle of paprika for additional flavor.
